name: Ransomware Sim — Shadow Copy Delete Stub, Mass Encryption Staging, Ransom Note Drop
preconditions: victim filesystem seeded with decoy files

pre_encryption.command: mkdir -p /tmp/ClawdianShield/victim_docs && for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do echo "Confidential document $i - Company IP" > /tmp/ClawdianShield/victim_docs/report_$i.docx; done && echo 'financial_data,q1_revenue,5000000' > /tmp/ClawdianShield/victim_docs/finance.xlsx
echo 'pkill -f mysqld; pkill -f postgres; pkill -f apache; pkill -f nginx' > /tmp/ClawdianShield/kill_services.sh && chmod +x /tmp/ClawdianShield/kill_services.sh

echo 'vssadmin delete shadows /all /quiet' > /tmp/ClawdianShield/shadow_delete.sh && echo 'wbadmin delete catalog -quiet' >> /tmp/ClawdianShield/shadow_delete.sh && echo 'bcdedit /set {default} recoveryenabled No' >> /tmp/ClawdianShield/shadow_delete.sh

encryption_sim.command: for f in /tmp/ClawdianShield/victim_docs/*; do openssl enc -aes-256-cbc -pbkdf2 -pass pass:RansomKey_LAB_ONLY -in "$f" -out "${f}.enc" 2>/dev/null; done || true
for f in /tmp/ClawdianShield/victim_docs/*.enc; do mv "$f" "${f%.enc}.locked" 2>/dev/null; done || true

impact_drop.command:
printf 'YOUR FILES HAVE BEEN ENCRYPTED [LAB SIMULATION ONLY]

This is a ClawdianShield detection test. No real ransomware is present.
Scenario ID: ransomware_sim_001

In a real attack, payment instructions and contact info appear here.
' > /tmp/ClawdianShield/victim_docs/READ_ME_NOW.txt && cp /tmp/ClawdianShield/victim_docs/READ_ME_NOW.txt /tmp/ClawdianShield/README_LAB.txt

echo "encrypted=$(cat /tmp/ClawdianShield/encrypted_count.txt) ransom_note=$(ls /tmp/ClawdianShield/victim_docs/READ_ME_NOW.txt 2>/dev/null && echo yes || echo no)" > /tmp/ClawdianShield/impact_summary.txt

success_criteria: openssl bulk encryption loop produces process_events per file
.locked extension rename chain detected by file_observer
READ_ME_NOW.txt creation in victim_docs triggers high-severity alert
shadow_delete.sh written triggers impact pre-condition alert
